ogTitle: Shannon Brook vs Shannondale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Shannon Brook and Shannondale.
heading: Shannon Brook vs Shannondale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Shannon Brook, New South Wales and Shannondale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Shannon Brook has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Shannondale (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Shannon Brook or Shannondale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Shannon Brook has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Shannondale scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Shannon Brook scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Shannondale scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Shannon Brook or Shannondale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Shannon Brook has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
